dataList.name: In the Past
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Past [過去]" activated
- Получает different effects based on стаков:
· 0~10: Skills наносит +1 more Burn Potency и Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skills наносит +2 more Burn Potency и +1 more Burn Count
· 21~30: Финальная сила +2; Skills наносит +3 more Burn Potency и +2 more Burn Count
- макс. стаков: 30

dataList.name: In the Present
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Present [現在]" activated
- Получает different effects based on стаков:
· 0~10: Skillsполучает +1 more Poise Potency и Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skillsполучает +2 more Poise Potency и +1 more Poise Count
· 21~30: Финальная сила +2; Skillsполучает +3 more Poise Potency и +2 more Poise Count
- макс. стаков: 30

dataList.name: In the Future
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Future [未來]" activated
- Получает different effects based on стаков:
· 0~10: Skills наносит +1 more Bleed Potency и Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skills наносит +2 more Bleed Potency и +1 more Bleed Count
· 21~30: Финальная сила +2; Skills наносит +3 more Bleed Potency и +2 more Bleed Count
- макс. стаков: 30

dataList.name: Temporal Disjunction
dataList.desc:
- Получает 1 стаков every time this unit switches between In the Past / In the Present / In the Future
- Take +(стаков x 15)% урона (макс. 150%)
- Начало хода: At 10 стаков, получает 5 Fragile
- макс. стаков: 10

dataList.name: Flower-burying Pin [埋花針]
dataList.desc:
- макс. стаков: 10
- Получает 1 Offense Уровень и 1 Defense Уровень за каждые 2 стаков
- At 5+ стаков, Финальная сила +1
- At макс. стаков, Сила монет +1
- When consuming Flower-burying Pin, give 1 Э.Г.О resource of the least-owned Affinity за каждые стаков consumed

dataList.name: Dragon's Blood [龍血]
dataList.desc:
- макс. Potency: 50
- Конец хода: Take 1% ХП урона per Potency (min 1; cannot be Staggered by this effect)
- Lose 1 Count when using a Defense Skill (один раз за ход)
- Конец хода: Double Potency и lose 1 Count
- This effect can be removed only by reducing Count to 0

dataList.name: Scaleclad
dataList.desc:
- макс. стаков: 20
- Does not expire at 0 стаков
- Lose 1 стаков when taking урона due to Flower-burying Pin
- Take +10% урона за каждые стаков lost

dataList.name: "It"
dataList.desc:
- Deal -100% урона using Unopposed Attacks
- Take +80% урона from Unopposed Attacks
- All Peccatulum Invidiae units, including this unit, equip only Defense Skills in their Skill Slots
- Конец хода: Lose 1 стаков

dataList.name: Viewing the Tableau
dataList.desc:
- Base Offense Уровень -20
- Base Defense Уровень -20
- Начало хода: Получает 7 Protection if The Ring Apprentice has not retreated from this Encounter
dataList.flavor: "The appreciation of artwork in a gallery calls for unhurried contemplation. Please remember—impatience dulls the appreciation of art."
